title: Speaking – Part 4: Discussion
description: The examiner asks broader questions related to the Part 3 theme.

content.theme: the impact of technology on human interaction

questions.question: To what extent do you think technology affects our ability to communicate effectively?
Some people argue that social media has negatively impacted face-to-face interactions. Do you agree?
How might advancements in communication technology change how we work in the future?
Is it the responsibility of individuals to manage their screen time effectively?
What role does education play in shaping people's attitudes towards technology use?
Do you think younger and older generations have different views on communication technology? Why might that be?

script.text: Now I'd like to ask you some more general questions related to the impact of technology on human interaction.
To what extent do you think technology affects our ability to communicate effectively?
Some people argue that social media has negatively impacted face-to-face interactions. Do you agree?
How might advancements in communication technology change how we work in the future?
Is it the responsibility of individuals to manage their screen time effectively?
What role does education play in shaping people's attitudes towards technology use?
Do you think younger and older generations have different views on communication technology? Why might that be?
Thank you very much. That is the end of the speaking test.
